name: opencode-peek
description: OpenCode session transcripts with token usage reports and extensible themes

scripts.test: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist-tests',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --experimental-sqlite --test dist-tests/tests/*.js && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist-tests',{recursive:true,force:true})"
